testcase.name: Show a var, this is the RHOSO-02 test
Check how a multiline string task name is handles for RHOSO-03
try a test where there is no ID, just the RHOSO prefix
Check what happens with multiple matches RHELOSP-054 RHOSO-056
Check that failed tests are also represented RHOSO-078

failure.message: If the task fails, the status will be reported since there's a test ID.
